name: brownstone-careers-pages
description: Brownstone Careers static website with Cloudflare Pages Functions and Resend email delivery.

scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node --check functions/_shared.js && node --check functions/api/applications.js && node --check functions/api/contact.js && node --check functions/api/health.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-forms.mjs && npm run build
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 pages deploy dist --project-name brownstone-careers
